references.title_zh: Agentic Patterns：前沿 Agent 系统的通用架构模式
references.summary_zh: 将 agentic 系统拆成 instruction、skills、control、context、interface、operate 和 anti-patterns。对本库最有价值的是：skill 不是孤立提示词，而是整个 agent 架构中的可复用工作流单元。
references.summary_en: Frames agentic systems around instructions, skills, control, context, interface, operations, and anti-patterns. It supports treating skills as reusable workflow units inside a broader agent architecture.
references.reliability_notes: Useful engineering synthesis. Treat platform-specific claims as volatile.

references.summary_zh: 定义 skill 为可移植的 instructions、scripts、resources 包，并强调渐进披露、支持文件、脚本治理和运行时集成。
references.summary_en: Defines skills as portable packages of instructions, scripts, and resources, with progressive disclosure, supporting files, script governance, and runtime integration.
references.reliability_notes: Official platform documentation; abstract implementation details into platform-neutral rules.

references.summary_zh: 强调简单、可组合的 agent 模式，区分 workflow 与 agent，并指出清晰成功标准、反馈循环和人工监督是生产 agent 的关键。
references.summary_en: Emphasizes simple composable patterns, the workflow-agent distinction, clear success criteria, feedback loops, and human oversight.
references.reliability_notes: High-quality engineering guidance; use as principle source, not quantitative proof.

references.title_en: Writing effective tools for AI agents - with agents
references.title_zh: 为 AI Agent 编写有效工具
references.summary_zh: 提出工具质量会显著影响 agent 效果。建议原型化工具、构建综合 eval、审查工具调用轨迹和工具返回，定位 agent 困惑点。
references.summary_en: Shows that tool quality strongly affects agent performance. Recommends prototyping tools, building comprehensive evals, and inspecting tool traces and responses.
references.reliability_notes: Directly relevant to skill scripts and tool-facing protocols.

references.summary_zh: 提供跨工具 skill 文件格式和目录结构的开放规范。适合抽象出最小可移植 skill 单元，但字段本身可能随生态变化。
references.summary_en: Provides an open cross-tool skill file and directory format. Useful for defining portable skill packages while treating exact fields as evolving.
references.reliability_notes: Open standard in a changing ecosystem; use the structure, not fixed vendor assumptions.

references.title_en: Toolformer: Language Models Can Teach Themselves to Use Tools
references.title_zh: Toolformer：语言模型可以学习使用工具
references.summary_zh: 提供工具使用的基础理论：模型要学会何时调用工具、调用哪个工具、传什么参数、如何整合结果。这可迁移为 skill 的触发和接口设计标准。
references.summary_en: Provides a foundational view of tool use: when to call a tool, which tool to call, what arguments to pass, and how to integrate the result.
references.reliability_notes: Research paper; not a modern skill packaging guide.
